title: Intensely Charred Syrian Eggplant Skewers
description: A Syrian-inspired dish featuring charred eggplant, red pepper paste, and a unique nigiri-shaping technique, perfect for a vegetarian-friendly brunch.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, approximately 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together red pepper paste, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the eggplant cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the red pepper paste mixture.
Thread the eggplant cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Grill the eggplant skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are intensely charred.
While the eggplant is grilling, mix the pomegranate molasses and lemon juice in a small bowl.
Once the eggplant is charred, brush the pomegranate molasses mixture onto the skewers.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
To achieve a nigiri-like shape, gently press the eggplant cubes together on each skewer after grilling.
